title: 5 for Friday
excerpt: 1. The perfect card & gift from Tina of lifelovepaper . The timing for this Vulli Teething Ring could not have worked better as Jack has been putting everything in his mouth. 2. This video with Blurb and Kal Barteski:…
body:
1. The perfect card & gift from Tina of lifelovepaper. The timing for this Vulli Teething Ring could not have worked better as Jack has been putting everything in his mouth.

2. This video with Blurb and Kal Barteski:

The last day to sign up for her life | scripted class at Studio Calico is today!

3. Ugh. Another case of an artist being blatantly copied. However, her outlook on the entire scenario is truly admirable.

4. On a more positive note, an article about parenthood by Girl of Cardigan that I can keep re-reading.

5. JC found this recipe for one of our favorite dishes from date night at The Wallace, cauliflower steak. Going to have to try to make it soon!
